title: IMMZ.D1.Capture or update client history
description: Data elements for the IMMZ.D1.Capture or update client history Data Dictionary Activity.

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for IMMZ_D1_Capture_or_update_client_history logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for IMMZ_D1_Capture_or_update_client_history logical model

IMMZD1.description: Data elements for the IMMZ.D1.Capture or update client history Data Dictionary Activity.

birthDose.description: Indicates if the client received a dose within 24 hours of birth. Whether a birth dose is counted as part of the primary series will depend on the antigen

typeOfDose.description: The type of dose in a series that the client received

completedThePrimaryVaccinationSeries.description: Indicates if the client has completed the primary vaccination series of a product/antigen. If the client has not yet completed their primary series, it means they may be expected to receive more doses to complete their vaccination regimen for the respective product/antigen

completedTheBoosterSeries.description: Indicates if the client has completed the booster series of a product/antigen

dateWhenPrimaryVaccinationSeriesWasCompl.description: The date when the client completed the primary vaccination series (per product/antigen)

hivStatus.description: The current HIV status of the client

pretermBirth.description: The infant was preterm; the mother gave birth to the infant when gestational age was less than 37 weeks

immunocompromised.description: The client is known to be immunocompromised. This means the client has a weakened immune system and having a reduced ability to fight infections and other diseases

currentlyOnArt.description: The client is currently receiving antiretroviral therapy (ART)

typeOfTbInfectionTestPerformed.description: The type of tuberculosis (TB) infection test performed

tbInfectionTestResult.description: Records the result of the TB infection test

immunologicallyStable.description: The client is living with HIV and is immunologically stable with CD4 count or percentage above a minimum as defined in the HIV guidelines

clinicallyWell.description: The client is living with HIV and is clinically well, as defined in HIV guidelines and WHO clinical staging

birthWeightInGrams.description: Represents the client's birth weight value measures in grams

typeOfPoliovirusDose.description: The type of the poliovirus vaccine dose administered to the client

artStartDate.description: The date on which the client started or restarted ART

highRiskOfPneumococcalInfection.description: The client is at high risk for pneumococcal infection because of underlying medical conditions (i.e. HIV infection or sickle-cell disease)

typeOfJeDose.description: The type of Japanese encephalitis (JE) vaccine dose administered to the client

typeOfTbeDose.description: The type of tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) vaccine dose administered

typeOfTyphoidDose.description: The type of typhoid vaccine dose administered to the client

typeOfCholeraDose.description: The type of cholera vaccine dose administered to the client

typeOfMeningococcalDose.description: The type of meningococcal vaccine dose administered to the client

ageInMonthsWhenClientReceivedFirstMening.description: The age in months when client received their first meningococcal dose

typeOfHepatitisADose.description: The type of hepatitis A-containing vaccine dose administered to the client

typeOfHepatitisBDose.description: The type of hepatitis B-containing vaccine dose administered to the client

vnaLevel.description: Vaccine-induced neutralizing antibody (VNA) level, measured as a serum antibody concentration from the result of the concentrated, purified cell culture-derived and embryonated egg-based rabies vaccines (CCEEV)

riskOfOccupationalExposureToRabiesVirus.description: Professional at risk of occupational exposure to rabies virus, particularly animal health workers. Also considered for medical professionals who regularly provide care to persons with rabies

dengueSerostatus.description: Indicates the result of a serological test determining whether the client has antibodies against the dengue virus

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet IMMZ.Z.VS

vaccineType.description: Vaccine type/category that was administered or was to be administered. Any vaccine code available in the IMMZ.Z Vaccine library list of codes applies in this data element

dateAndTimeOfVaccination.description: Represents the visit/encounter date, which is the date and time when each vaccine was administered to the client

contactDate.description: The date and time of the client's contact

ancContactNumber.description: The antenatal care (ANC) contact or visit number

doseNumber.description: Vaccine dose number including dose number within series
